dashboardIntro: This version contains the initial layout, routing, translations and empty bounded-context folders for the team workflow.
personOneTask: Project base, layout, toolbar, router, dashboard and i18n.
personTwoTask: IAM, login, register, profile and settings.
personThreeTask: Kitchen monitoring, devices, sensors and zones.
gitReadyText: Each empty module folder includes a .gitkeep file so Git can track the structure before the real code is added.
comingSoonText: This route is already linked from the toolbar. The real implementation should be added from its own feature branch.
